{{Quote|Now the Battling 166th Troubadours can hold rehearsals out there in the wilderness – which, if you've ever heard them play, you know is probably for the best|[[Grondorn Muse]]|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
The '''Battling 166th Troubadours''' were a military [[Band/Legends|band]] from [[Bela Vistal/Legends|Bela Vistal]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. As of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] the band's leader was [[Pytor Tuko]].
